testcase.classname: JosePrivateFDC3Security constructor should create instance with valid parameters
testcase.name: JosePrivateFDC3Security constructor should create instance with valid parameters

testcase.classname: JosePrivateFDC3Security constructor should throw error when signing public key has no kid
testcase.name: JosePrivateFDC3Security constructor should throw error when signing public key has no kid

testcase.classname: JosePrivateFDC3Security constructor should throw error when wrapping public key has no kid
testcase.name: JosePrivateFDC3Security constructor should throw error when wrapping public key has no kid

testcase.classname: JosePrivateFDC3Security integration should sign and then check a context using two instances
testcase.name: JosePrivateFDC3Security integration should sign and then check a context using two instances

testcase.classname: JosePrivateFDC3Security integration should encrypt and then decrypt a context using a symmetric key
testcase.name: JosePrivateFDC3Security integration should encrypt and then decrypt a context using a symmetric key

testcase.classname: JosePrivateFDC3Security integration should encrypt and then decrypt a context using a public/private key pair between two instances
testcase.name: JosePrivateFDC3Security integration should encrypt and then decrypt a context using a public/private key pair between two instances

testcase.classname: JosePrivateFDC3Security integration should wrap and then unwrap a symmetric key using two instances
testcase.name: JosePrivateFDC3Security integration should wrap and then unwrap a symmetric key using two instances

testcase.classname: JosePrivateFDC3Security integration should handle malformed signatures gracefully
testcase.name: JosePrivateFDC3Security integration should handle malformed signatures gracefully

testcase.classname: JosePrivateFDC3Security integration should reject stale signatures (signature freshness)
testcase.name: JosePrivateFDC3Security integration should reject stale signatures (signature freshness)

testcase.classname: JosePrivateFDC3Security integration should reject expired contexts (context validity)
testcase.name: JosePrivateFDC3Security integration should reject expired contexts (context validity)

testcase.classname: JosePrivateFDC3Security integration should reject signatures with header missing required fields
testcase.name: JosePrivateFDC3Security integration should reject signatures with header missing required fields

testcase.classname: JosePrivateFDC3Security integration should create and verify a JWT token
testcase.name: JosePrivateFDC3Security integration should create and verify a JWT token
